rationale: No conflict. Elec. Code §273.061 governs mandamus jurisdiction over election-related duties; it is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The supreme court or a court of appeals may issue a writ of mandamus to compel the performance of any duty imposed by law in connection with the holding of an election or a political party convention
_note: Rule text concerns election mandamus jurisdiction; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
